desc:
You are in the master bedroom. A large, by Hobbit standards, double bed is
against the north wall. Set in the eastern wall, is a window, giving a view of
the whole Maggot farm. A door leading to a closet is on the west wall.
name: Master Bedroom

desc:
In this small closet, all you can see are some Hobbit clothes and a small wooden
chest placed against the north wall. Although nothing seems to be out of the
ordinary, you have a sense that there is more here than meets the eye.
name: Closet

desc:
You find yourself on the top of a hill. The ground seen barren here. You try to
look through the misty air, but all you see is the shapes of the other hills,
looking like huge, ancient, grazing creatures.
name: On the Top of a Hill

desc:
You are on the top of a hill. A circle of stones, looking like dancing giants,
mark the entrance to some old tomb. The entrance, once covered by a huge
guarding rock, is now only covered by a heap of stones. They seem to slowly
shift back into place when you move them.
name: On the Top of a Hill

desc:
You find yourself on the top of a hill. The ground seen barren here. You try to
look through the misty air, but all you see is the shapes of the other hills,
looking like huge, ancient, grazing creatures.
name: On the Top of a Hill

desc:
Around you the Barrow-Downs rise, ridge behind ridge, vanishing out of sight in
the distance. The air is misty, and the sound of your steps is enhanced by the
humidity. You stand on a small hill, encircled by other hills. You can barely
see the sky through the dense air.
name: On the Small Hill

desc:
You have finally reached this small hill, but it seems to look very much like
all other hills around. Thus you must continue, or stay here for the rest of
your life.
name: On the Small Hill

desc:
You find yourself on the top of a hill. The ground seen barren here. You try to
look through the misty air, but all you see is the shapes of the other hills,
looking like huge, ancient, grazing creatures.
name: On the Top of a Hill

desc:
You have finally reached this small hill, but it seems to look very much like
all other hills around. Thus you must continue, or stay here for the rest of
your life.
name: On the Small Hill

desc:
You have finally reached this small hill, but it seems to look very much like
all other hills around. Thus you must continue, or stay here for the rest of
your life.
name: On the Small Hill

desc:
A small cave extends in the side of the canyon. Its walls are rough and wet,
small trickles of water dripping down towards the ground where it gathers in
tiny pools. Further in the sound of falling water can be heard.
name: The Cave by the Spring

desc:
The cave ends in a small waterfall, with rocks preventing anyone from following
the stream on its way southwards. The air is damp and still and filled with a
scent of freshness. The cave extends eastwards.
name: The Waterfall

desc:
You find yourself on the top of a hill. The ground seen barren here. You try to
look through the misty air, but all you see is the shapes of the other hills,
looking like huge, ancient, grazing creatures.
name: On the Top of a Hill

desc:
You find yourself on the top of a hill. The ground seen barren here. You try to
look through the misty air, but all you see is the shapes of the other hills,
looking like huge, ancient, grazing creatures.
name: On the Top of a Hill

desc:
Around you the Barrow-Downs rise, ridge behind ridge, vanishing out of sight in
the distance. The air is misty, and the sound of your steps is enhanced by the
humidity. You stand on a small hill, encircled by other hills. You can barely
see the sky through the dense air.
name: On the Small Hill

desc:
Around you the Barrow-Downs rise, ridge behind ridge, vanishing out of sight in
the distance. The air is misty, and the sound of your steps is enhanced by the
humidity. You stand on a small hill, encircled by other hills. You can barely
see the sky through the dense air.
name: On the Small Hill

desc:
Your way winds around the hills and between the steep slopes. It seems to be a
very seldom used path, but you have no trouble following it. Your legs are
really starting to get tired from all this travelling. Perhaps you should rest,
after all.
name: A Path around the Hills

desc:
This path seem to go round and round, and you seem to come to the same place
time after time. You have lost sense of directions.
name: A Path around the Hills

desc:

name: On the Small Hill

desc:
You stand on a path that seem to go north into a wall of bushes. Southwards the
path goes up a small hill. East and west you see the hills rolling away like
huge waves on the sea.
name: By the Bushes

desc:
Walls of stone surround you completely, except for the staircase going up. There
are no ornaments, no altars, no colours and no coffins, just bare, grey
stonewalls. The room is about five yards by five and ten feet high.
name: The Tomb

desc:
Walls of stone surround you completely, except for the staircase going up. There
are no ornaments, no altars, no colours and no coffins, just bare, grey
stonewalls. The room is about five yards by five, and ten feet high.
name: The Tomb

desc:
Walls of stone surround you completely, except for the staircase going up. There
are no ornaments, no altars, no colours and no coffins, just bare, grey
stonewalls. The room is about five yards by five, and ten feet high.
name: The Tomb

desc:
Walls of smooth, grey stone surround you completely, except for the staircase
leading up. There are no ornaments, altars, colours or coffins. Only the bare,
grey stone walls can be seen in this empty room which measures about ten feet
high and sixteen feet on each side.
name: The Tomb

desc:
Walls of stone surround you completely, except for the staircase going up. There
are no ornaments, no altars, no colours and no coffins, just bare, grey
stonewalls. The room is about five yards by five and ten feet high.
name: The Tomb

desc:

all other hills around. Thus you must continue, or stay here for the rest of

desc:
You find yourself on the top of a hill. The ground seen barren here. You try to
look through the misty air, but all you see is the shapes of the other hills,
looking like huge, ancient, grazing creatures.
name: On the Top of a Hill

desc:
You find yourself on the top of a hill. The ground seems barren here. You try to
look through the misty air, but all you see is the shapes of the other hills,
looking like huge, ancient, grazing creatures.
name: On the Top of a Hill

desc:
Eastwards the Barrow-downs rise, ridge behind ridge, vanishing out of sight in
the distance. The air is misty, and the sound of your steps is enhanced by the
humidity. Westwards the landscape seem more flat.
name: On the Small Hill
